title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 265.283 - Sale of fresh meat from a foreign nation, when
text:
265.283.  Sale of fresh meat from a foreign nation, when. — No person shall knowingly sell at wholesale or retail any fresh meat imported from any foreign nation without complying with all of the provisions of sections 265.280 to 265.289.
(L. 1999 S.B. 310 § 8)
